element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary weapon with limited ammo; fires one slow bullet at a time when ammunition depleted
Players learn to enter doors to hide and take cover from enemy fire; doors marked 'bullets' or 'arms' contain ammunition
Use for cover from enemy projectiles; can be jumped over
Jump to higher/lower floors using rails and stairs; falling without floor causes instant death
Color/outfit determines strength and attack pattern; learn to differentiate threat levels
Found in 'arms' doors; allows continuous fire by holding button; superior to pistol
Thrown by certain Masker variants; forces tactical repositioning
More aggressive enemy type; requires learned evasion patterns
Flying enemy type; adds aerial threat dimension
High-difficulty creature variant; requires precise timing
Story 2 exclusive; adds environmental hazard context
Stages 6-10 feature more traps and different enemy placement; accessed via password
Geldra leader; final combat encounter; requires integrated mastery of all mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Stage completion cinematic (Leila torture scene on monitor)
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy Masker appearance with different color variants
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based combat with reload pressure; alternates between active firefight and cover-seeking phases; escalates per-stage through enemy variety rather than density

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Doors marked 'bullets' or 'arms' signal resource availability; unmarked doors function as pure cover

difficulty_curve.early_game: Maskers only; pistol is sufficient; cover mechanics tutorial implicit
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of specialized Masker variants (grenade throwers, kneeling shooters); submachine gun becomes available; environmental hazards increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Story 1: Ninjas, bats, panthers, shrieking creatures added; Story 2: Harder stage versions with more traps, repositioned enemies, lava men
notable_spikes: Flying enemy introduction (Gelzos add vertical threat)
Lava men in Story 2 (environmental damage hazard)
Maboo boss fight (requires integrated skill mastery)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game divided into Story 1 (5 stages) and Story 2 (5 stages). Story 2 stages mirror Story 1 geography but with increased trap frequency and altered enemy placement; accessible only via password after Story 1 completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 1 vs Stage 6 (same location, different difficulty)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage conclusion displays Leila's torture on in-game monitor; provides narrative progression and relief moment between active stages
Ammunition availability gates weapon effectiveness; pistol provides fallback (slow single-bullet mode) but incentivizes finding 'arms' doors; transitions submachine gun to premium resource
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages 1-5 establish pattern; Story 2 enforces stricter ammo discipline

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages introduce Masker variants sequentially (basic → grenades → kneeling → new type), allowing learning curve compression within single stage
